sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '听' (listen) changes the structure of the question, making it a repeated question ('why listen or not listen') instead of the original statement. This alters the meaning significantly.

Substituting '好' (good) with '我' (me) changes the meaning of the sentence, as the original asks 'why don't you listen well', while the actual says 'why listen or not listen to me', which is a different question.
